Workshops

*Co-organized The pilot version of Introudction to Quantum Computing, within the Amsterdam Quantum Talent and learning Center (QTLC), hybrid event, held in four locations in the Netherlands, and online, Fontys, Saxion, Eindhoven and Amsterdam *
